Video.summary: Did you know that English Bulldogs can sleep for 22 hours a day if they're not disturbed?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Bulldog Brigade

Image.alt: TPC That's My Pet | Bulldog Brigade
TPC That's My Pet | Bulldog Brigade
TPC That's My Pet | Bulldog Brigade

Video.summary: Did you know there are over 51 species of rats that have been discovered.
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Rodents

Video.summary: Did you know a group of Pugs is called a “grumbling”
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Pugs

Video.summary: Did you know most kittens are born with Blue-Gray eyes that will change pigments within their first year of life?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Kittens

Video.summary: Did you know Lizards can smell stuff with their tongues?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Lizards

Video.summary: Did you know all breeds of horses are considered domesticated, even if they are wild horses.
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Horses

Video.summary: Did you know a domesticated Raccoon can live up to twenty years?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Raccoons

Video.summary: Did you know puppies are born blind and deaf?!
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Puppies

Video.summary: Did you know there are over 70 different species of turtles?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Turtles

Video.summary: Did you know the biggest difference between Ponies and Mini Horses are the height? Ponies are under 58 inches while mini horses are under 34 inches tall!
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Ponies

Video.summary: Did you know that there are 260 types of monkeys in the world?
Video.title: TPC That's My Pet | Monkeys

Video.summary: Cats, dogs, bears, birds and more come together to create cuteness overload in this episode.
Video.title: We Heart Animals | Cuteness Overload

Video.summary: Cute clips of smart (and not so smart) pets.
Video.title: We Heart Animals | Teacher's Pet

Video.summary: Weird animal noises, sassy pets, cats doing weird cat things, cute puppies and more.
Video.title: We Heart Animals | Stranger Things

Video.summary: In this episode we feature puppies washed in the sink. You're welcome.
Video.title: Animals Unscripted | Shampooch

Video.title: Countdown: The Funniest Pets | Paw-stuck!

Video.summary: Take a break and unwind with your furry friends - it's the purrfect way to relax.
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dogs or cats, paws or claws - playtime is for everyone to have fun!

Video.title: Paws VS. Claws | Antics
